sourceMovie.title: The Bourne Legacy
sourceMovie.whyPeopleLoveIt: People revisit The Bourne Legacy for the same reason it broke through in 2012: clear stakes, memorable faces, and a thriller rhythm that doesn't stall in the middle. Tony Gilroy keeps the ensemble pointed in one direction. The action and thriller blend is the engine: it lets the film shift registers without feeling like two different movies stitched together.

recommendations.title: Skyfall
recommendations.whyYoullLoveIt: If The Bourne Legacy clicked for you, Skyfall (2012) is a strong next stop: both trade in action and thriller, with momentum and clean stakes. Expect a different story, but a similar willingness to go big when the moment demands it.

faq.question: What should I watch after The Bourne Legacy?
faq.answer: Try Skyfall, Tenet, Mission: Impossible - Ghost Protocol—each shares DNA with The Bourne Legacy while changing the setting enough to feel fresh.

faq.question: What genre is The Bourne Legacy?
faq.answer: The Bourne Legacy (2012) is best described as Action, Thriller. Stores and algorithms use different labels, but that mix is what fans actually recognize on a rewatch.

faq.question: Is The Bourne Legacy part of a franchise?
faq.answer: Yes—it's part of the "The Bourne Collection" storyline. You can enjoy it standalone, but sequels and tie-ins build on characters and continuity established here.
